---
id: extend-sims-using-post
title: "Create SIM Extension"
description: "Trigger the SIM extension for one or more SIM cards to extend their activation period and renew their quota (data and SMS). An invoice is automatically triggered depending on the chosen payment method."
sidebar_label: "Create SIM Extension"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/sim-management/sim-management
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create SIM Extension"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/sims/extension"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Trigger the SIM extension for one or more SIM cards to extend their activation period and renew their quota (data and SMS). An invoice is automatically triggered depending on the chosen payment method.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
